title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Boat

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Boat
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Boat! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Boat:
Boat is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat!
